sleepTargets.label: Nap 1
sleepTargets.notes: Keep the first nap anchored so the second nap lands well.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 2
sleepTargets.notes: Wake gently if this nap runs too late into the afternoon.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: An earlier bedtime is usually the best rescue after a skipped second nap.

feedTargets.label: Morning milk
feedTargets.notes: Start the day with milk before solids if that suits your routine.

feedTargets.label: Lunch feed
feedTargets.notes: Keep lunch consistent so the second nap stays easier.

feedTargets.label: Afternoon top-up
feedTargets.notes: A small milk feed can steady the run to bedtime.

feedTargets.label: Bedtime milk
feedTargets.notes: Keep the bedtime feed calm and predictable.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
